faqs.question: How much does fly control cost in Piscataway?
faqs.answer: Our professional fly control services in Piscataway range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of flies present. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of flies are common in Piscataway, NJ?
faqs.answer: Piscataway properties commonly experience issues with house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and cluster flies. Restaurants and food businesses near Rutgers may also encounter blow flies and bottle flies, while residential areas see seasonal increases in fly activity during warmer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a fly infestation in Piscataway?
faqs.answer: Most fly infestations in Piscataway homes and businesses show significant reduction within 24-48 hours of initial treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 1-2 weeks depending on the infestation severity, with follow-up visits included to ensure all breeding sites are addressed.
